description: AI content generation platform that transforms Claude coding sessions into blog posts, social content, and changelogs

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS v4 with custom sf-* design tokens

monorepo_structure.apps/dashboard: Main Next.js web application (all UI and API routes)

migration_commands.generate: bun run db:generate (runs: cd packages/db && bunx drizzle-kit generate)
migration_commands.push: bun run db:push (runs: cd packages/db && bunx drizzle-kit push)

auth_pattern.server_check: import { auth } from '@/lib/auth'; import { headers } from 'next/headers'; const session = await auth.api.getSession({ headers: await headers() });

api_route_conventions.params_pattern: Next.js 15: { params }: { params: Promise<{ slug: string }> } — must await params
api_route_conventions.auth_first: Always check session before any DB operations
api_route_conventions.ownership_check: Verify workspace.ownerId === session.user.id before any workspace operations
api_route_conventions.import_pattern: import { auth } from '@/lib/auth'; import { headers } from 'next/headers'; import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'; import { db } from '@/lib/db'; import { tableName } from '@sessionforge/db'; import { eq, and } from 'drizzle-orm';

client_component_conventions.routing: useParams<{ workspace: string; postId?: string }>() for URL params
client_component_conventions.data_fetching: useQuery({ queryKey: ['key', param], queryFn: async () => { const res = await fetch(...); if (!res.ok) throw new Error(...); return res.json(); }, enabled: !!param })

tailwind_design_system.note: All UI must use these sf-* custom tokens — do NOT use default Tailwind bg-white, text-gray-*, etc.
tailwind_design_system.button_primary: bg-sf-accent text-sf-bg-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-sf font-medium text-sm hover:bg-sf-accent-dim transition-colors disabled:opacity-50
tailwind_design_system.button_secondary: bg-sf-bg-secondary border border-sf-border text-sf-text-secondary px-3 py-1.5 rounded-sf text-sm font-medium hover:text-sf-text-primary hover:border-sf-border-strong transition-colors
tailwind_design_system.input: bg-sf-bg-secondary border border-sf-border text-sf-text-primary rounded-sf px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-sf-border-focus
tailwind_design_system.label: text-xs text-sf-text-secondary font-medium uppercase tracking-wide

existing_utilities.markdown_to_html: import { markdownToHtml } from '@/lib/export'; — converts markdown string to HTML

required_existing: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET — Used as master key for encrypting WordPress app passwords
environment_variables.no_new_vars_needed: WordPress credentials are stored encrypted in the DB per workspace, not in env vars
